raw_consumer_statement:
i received a letter from " CitiBank XXXX XXXX '' regarding suspicious activity on XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX, fraudulent activity began with a charge of {$2400.00} for a " luxury owner assoc. XXXX ''. another charge of {$3400.00} was made to the same company on XX/XX/XXXX. A telephone payment was made on XX/XX/XXXX, taking {$3300.00} from my bank account to pay it. then, on XX/XX/XXXX, another pay by phone payment was made with my bank account in the amount of {$3500.00}. On XX/XX/XXXX, I made a payment by check for the previous month ( XXXX bill of {$820.00}. ) From XX/XX/XXXX to XX/XX/XXXX, " foreign purchase transaction fees '', various transactions in XXXX and XXXX, and returned check charges were added DAILY, sometimes several a day, from amounts of $ XXXX {$120.00}. There was another payment taken from my bank account on XX/XX/XXXX, in the amount of {$2400.00}, putting my account in the negative and being issued insufficient funds fees of {$30.00} from my bank. ( which led other transactions for other bills to also receive {$30.00} isf fees thereafter. ) The total fraud charged to my card was {$10000.00}. 
i immediately called them and filed a complaint, which, i was informed in a letter on XX/XX/XXXX, was " determined that you ( I ) are responsible for the charges ''. I contacted them again to file the complaint again, and received a letter XX/XX/XXXX stating that they again completed their investigation and again determined that im responsible for the charges. they will not budge or give any explanation as to how they determined the charges are my fault. I have never been to XXXX, XXXX, or ever paid by phone.
